author: Weatherman118
goal: Reverse-engineer Weatherman118's exact entry + exit system. Paper trade on Alpaca until 80%+ consistent win rate, then go live. ONE Pine Script = his secret sauce. Perfect it over time.

sessions.summary: Fixed silent-alert blackout cascade: removed REQUIRE_1M_FRESH gate, AVOID_MIDDAY=False, switched bars Alpaca-SIP->yfinance (yf.Ticker().history), fixed vol=0 MultiIndex. PRs #66 #67 #70 merged.

June-19 chart study (30 charts in 'june 19 2026/'). Codified A+ Shelf Bounce. Shipped Session-VWAP gate (cond #6), Chandelier Exit (10/2), float 20M->10M, SCANNER_REL_VOL_MIN=3.0 split from bar REL_VOL_MIN=1.5, DEEP_CURL_RESET 20->30. PR #71 merged.
Pine v5-shelf-bounce.pine — mirrors bot exactly (VWAP+Chandelier+MACD 5/10/16+A+ star). PR #72 merged.
Fixed vol 0.0x on every ticker (yfinance pads live edge with 0-vol bars; strip trailing zeros). Added ranked TOP SETUPS log board. PR #73 merged.
Coil near-miss alert (Tier-1+hook+MACD pass, only volume short -> manual 🌀 COIL; auto-buy untouched). Documented 6-condition priority tiers. Updated Pine + this vault. PR #74.

current_state_2026_06_19.note: SUPERSEDES older stale fields below wherever they conflict. Most recent truth.
current_state_2026_06_19.macd: 5/10/16 (NOT 12/26/9) — requires line>0 AND hist>0 as a hard gate. Owner-confirmed 2026-06-19.
current_state_2026_06_19.bars_data_feed: yfinance (yf.Ticker().history, period=5d, interval=5m/1m, prepost=True). Alpaca SIP needs a paid sub; do NOT use Alpaca for bars. Alpaca is ORDERS-only.

new_indicators.chandelier_exit: ATR 10, mult 2, use-close; exit on a candle close below the long-stop line

alert_types.auto_buy: full pass only (learning phase: takes every grade)

current_state_2026_06_19.vps_after_merge: cd /root/tradingbaby && git pull origin main && sudo systemctl restart w118bot

stoch_rsi.trigger: K crosses UP through 20 from below — ta.crossover(k, 20)
stoch_rsi.requirement: K must be above D at trigger
stoch_rsi.pre_entry_state: K typically at 0-10 before cross (near absolute zero)

smoothed_ha.trigger: Current candle must be green (sha_close > sha_open)
smoothed_ha.calculation: Double EMA(10,10) on Heikin Ashi values
smoothed_ha.note: First green candle after red = curl forming

zlsma_50.rule: NEVER enter if price is below ZLSMA-50 — trade is invalid

confirmed_entry_conditions.float: < 10M shares preferred (tightened 2026-06-05), $0.10–$5 sweet spot, NASDAQ only
confirmed_entry_conditions.absolute_volume_min: > 1M shares/day — filters dead stocks (HTLM lesson: 69K vol passed Rel Vol filter but was untradeable)

supertrend.trigger: Supertrend flips bullish (green) on 5m = PRIMARY entry trigger
supertrend.settings: ATR Period=10, Source=(H+L)/2, ATR Multiplier=2, Change ATR Calc Method=true
supertrend.note: Supertrend replaced W118 Buy label as trigger. W118 label fires after move starts (lagging). Supertrend catches the flip itself.

macd.trigger: MACD histogram > 0 (MACD line above signal line) = momentum building
macd.note: Critical filter — BCDA had deeply negative MACD at same time as K reset. MACD negative = fading. Skip.

confirmed_exit_rules.sha_exit: SHA flips red for 2+ consecutive candles
confirmed_exit_rules.stoch_exit: Stoch RSI K crosses back below 20

fast_exit_rules_3x.description: Data-derived from 101-trade analysis. All 3 toggled ON by default in Pine Script.

rule1_k_depth.description: K must have been below 10 within the 3 bars before the crossover
rule1_k_depth.pine: k_was_low = k[1] < 10 or k[2] < 10 or k[3] < 10

rule3_hard_t2.description: Exit 100% at T2 (+30%). No trailing to T3.

known_bugs_fixed: 2026-06-02: Massive grouped daily endpoint returned EOD data — switched to snapshot gainers (real-time)
2026-06-02: Timezone was UTC-5 (EST) instead of UTC-4 (EDT) — scanner started 1hr late
2026-06-02: Time gate was 4am-4pm instead of 4am-10:30am — could trade all day
2026-06-02: No duplicate-entry guard — scanner could re-buy same ticker next minute
2026-06-02: No daily trade cap — added MAX_DAILY_TRADES=3
2026-06-03: Polygon fallback URL was api.massive.com (wrong domain) — user fixed to api.polygon.io in n8n; local file synced
2026-06-03: StochRSI condition too strict (exact crossover only) — widened to K in 20-60 AND K>D
2026-06-03: SHA check removed — fires after initial move, too laggy for entry signal
2026-06-03: fetch() is undefined in n8n sandbox — replaced ALL fetch() calls with $helpers.httpRequest()
2026-06-03: Polygon free tier is 15-min delayed — switched to FMP real-time gainers
2026-06-03: Scanner ran 24/7 wasting resources — added 4am-5pm ET time gate (UTC 8-21)
2026-06-03: Scanner ran every 1 min with Polygon (15-min data) — changed to every 6 min with FMP (real-time, 250/day limit)
2026-06-05: Float filter tightened from <20M to <10M — HTLM had 191M mkt cap and only 69K volume, passed filter but was untradeable
2026-06-05: Added absolute volume >1M requirement — Rel Vol alone is misleading (16x of 4K = still nothing)
2026-06-05: Entry trigger changed from W118 Buy label to Supertrend 5m flip — W118 label is lagging, Supertrend catches trend change itself
2026-06-05: Added MACD histogram >0 as confirmation filter — BCDA had K reset but MACD deeply negative, correctly skipped
2026-06-05: Time gate tightened from UTC 8-21 (4am-5pm ET) to UTC 8-15 (4am-11am ET) — afternoon signals confirmed can't reach T1/T2/T3
2026-06-12: Colab scanner morning_scan() replaced broken finvizfinance+Yahoo with FMP gainers (same source as n8n) — scanner returning zero was silent finviz/Yahoo breakage

2026-06-15: n8n full scanner now has all 5 W118 entry conditions: calcSupertrend(ATR=10,hl2,mult=2) PRIMARY, K>D, price>ZLSMA-50, calcMACD(12,26,9) hist>0, vol>4x. FMP pre-filter tightened to $5 max, +10% min, abs vol >1M

data_sources_research.finviz: REJECTED — no official API, returns HTML only, blocks automated requests. Not suitable for n8n.
data_sources_research.polygon_free: REJECTED — 15-min delayed on free tier. Not acceptable for momentum trading.
data_sources_research.fmp: CURRENT — Financial Modeling Prep free tier (250 req/day), REAL-TIME JSON gainers at financialmodelingprep.com/api/v3/stock_market/gainers. Every 6 min = 240 calls/day (under limit).
data_sources_research.alpaca_screener: BROKEN on free tier — needs paid SIP subscription. Silently returns empty.
data_sources_research.tradingview: PRIMARY signal source — Yassss screener + W118 Pine Script alerts. TV Pro webhooks fire instantly to n8n. Zero-cost, zero-delay.

paper_trading.why_not_1000: 10 shares × $15 max = $150/trade. $1k works but $10k simulates a real small account better and gives room for multiple simultaneous positions.
paper_trading.why_not_100000: Alpaca default $100k is too big — masks whether the SYSTEM is profitable vs just lucky with size.
paper_trading.audit_cadence: Weekly review: compare signals fired vs W118 criteria, win rate, avg %, drawdown
paper_trading.auditor: Claude Code — review Alpaca order history each session and compare to trades-parsed.json patterns

crowd_psychology_map.K_0_10: CAPITULATION — last sellers gave up. Nobody left to sell.
crowd_psychology_map.K_curls_up_through_20: THE SHIFT — one quiet buyer stepped in. Crowd notices.
crowd_psychology_map.SHA_green: HOPE — buyers winning the minute-to-minute battle.
crowd_psychology_map.volume_explodes_10x: FRENZY — the whole city showed up. Fuel is here.
crowd_psychology_map.price_holds_above_ZLSMA: BELIEF — rational buyers defending the floor.
crowd_psychology_map.W118_BUY_fires: THE HELICOPTER — all systems green. Act NOW. No hesitation.
crowd_psychology_map.W118_SELL_fires: PARTY IS OVER — smart money leaving. Get out WITH them.
crowd_psychology_map.user_superpower: Cross-domain pattern recognition. Watches humans make emotional decisions under pressure (I Shouldn't Be Alive, podcasts). Trading IS that same show.

schwab_roth_cash.notes: Cash only — long-term holdings tracked separately, do not touch

webull_cash.notes: Primary day trading — no PDT rule

account_status.account_type_recommendation: Use Webull CASH account (not margin) to avoid PDT rule. Cash account = unlimited day trades as long as you use settled funds.

webull_rules.pdt_rule: Pattern Day Trader rule ONLY applies to margin accounts under $25,000. 4+ day trades in 5-day rolling window = PDT flagged = restricted to 3 day trades/week.

cash_account.settlement: T+2 (funds settle 2 business days after sale)
cash_account.instant_buying_power: Up to $1,000 Webull instant settlement buffer
cash_account.good_faith_violation: Buying with unsettled funds then selling same day = violation. 3 violations in 12 months = 90-day restriction to settled-cash-only.

webull_rules.safe_cash_workflow: Start with settled cash → buy → sell same day (OK) → wait T+2 before reusing proceeds, OR use Webull instant buying power buffer.

CALC.note: MACD positive, above ZLSMA, +7% from entry. T1 ($1.14) realistic Monday.

VVOS.note: AH dip below $0.80 stop. If opens Monday below $0.80 → exit at market immediately. 15m K=18 at close was bullish but AH undercut stop level.

week_2026-05-26_to_05-28.best_trade: MASK +$16.36 (halted at $4.25 — sold too early at $2.90, missed $55 with T1/T2/T3)
week_2026-05-26_to_05-28.worst_trade: YMAT -$36.54 (no stop, overnight hold below ZLSMA)

trades.lesson: Clean W118 entry. First real win.
Chased 30% above BUY signal. 3% rule violated.
No stop set. Held overnight below ZLSMA. THE airbag lesson.
Held through halt-up. Exited clean on SELL + K=100.
Late entry but still +11%. Size up at original premarket signal.
Sold all at $2.90 out of nerves. Halted at $4.25. T1/T2/T3 = $72 instead of $16. THE exit lesson.
Entered before signal (grader said F). Got lucky — signal fired after entry. Wait for the signal.
Rushed before open. Held through pullback to near stop. TradingView alert at $2.75 handled exit. Alerts remove emotion.

user_profile.name: positivitysparkles
user_profile.learning_style: Cross-domain pattern recognition. Sees crowd psychology loops in survival shows (I Shouldn't Be Alive), podcasts, real life. Trading is reading human emotion, not math.
strengths: Knows when to stop for the day
areas_to_improve: Position sizing — going bigger at clean premarket setups
Entering at the BUY signal price, not 10-30% above it
user_profile.account_size_context: Trading $20-40 per account right now — intentionally small. Building muscle memory. When skill is proven, scale up.
user_profile.podcast_vision: Building toward a trading podcast / teaching others using this system and psychological framework.
user_profile.divine_inspo: User has gut-feel pattern recognition that fires before the indicator confirms — treat this as edge, not noise.

training_materials.pattern_recognition_guide: training/pattern_recognition_guide.png — 18x22 infographic: 3 patterns (A/B/C), Stoch RSI at close guide, ZLSMA rules, entry mistakes, rel volume guide, 6 entry conditions

flashcards.stories: training/flashcards/card_stories.md — memory stories for all 14 cards

end_of_day_patterns.pattern_A_fade: First red day. Price below ZLSMA at close. Skip — don't show up for leftovers.
end_of_day_patterns.pattern_B_runner: Multi-day runner. Still above ZLSMA, K resetting overnight. Watch for next day re-entry.
end_of_day_patterns.pattern_C_accumulation: Sold off all day, K near zero at close. BEST setup. BUY fires by 4am next morning.

features: Green BUY label showing [PM] or [RTH] profile + K value at entry
Red EXIT label when position closes
Dashed lines at entry: red=stop(-8%), lime=T1(+15%), green=T2(+30%), teal=T3(+60%)
Orange warning: SHA turns red 2+ consecutive candles
Red warning: price breaks below ZLSMA-50
Gray SKIP label: base signal fires but blocked by fast-exit rules
Green/red background = above/below ZLSMA flow zone
pine_script_status.known_limitation: Strategy Tester is UNRELIABLE with SHA scripts. Non-standard chart warning = meaningless numbers. Use manual trade log.
pine_script_status.chart_indicators_keep: W118 Pine Script + Stoch RSI + Supertrend (10 hl2 2) + MACD (12,26,9) + Volume. Supertrend is now PRIMARY entry trigger. MACD is confirmation filter.

key_insights: Pre-entry Stoch RSI K is consistently 0-20 (usually 0-10) on 5m chart. ta.crossover(k,20) = start of spike, not chasing.
All 3 trade profiles (PM fresh, RTH fresh, re-entries) have 100% win rate — use all 3.
NEVER enter more than 3% above the BUY signal price. That's the bus-chasing rule.
K=100 + SELL label fired = exit immediately. Don't wait for more. Party is over.
K crossing below D at overbought levels (90+) = bearish rollover. Exit or skip.
Halt-up = hold through it if SELL hasn't fired. Resume = your exit window.
Position size UP at clean premarket setups. Small size = small profit even on big % moves.
Cash account = no PDT rule. Perfect for small accounts doing 1-3 trades/morning.
The waiting game IS the game. 90% watching, 10% clicking.
AIRBAG LESSON (YMAT 05-26): Stop loss is NON-NEGOTIABLE. -8% stop = $10 loss. No stop = $36 loss. Never hold below ZLSMA overnight. Never.
T1/T2/T3 EXIT LESSON (MASK 05-28): Set targets BEFORE you enter. Trim 1/3 at each. MASK ran $2.69 to $5.30 — sold all at $2.90 = $16. T1/T2/T3 = $99+. Same trade, 6x more profit.
WAIT FOR THE SIGNAL (NCT/QTEX 05-28): Intuition finds the stock. The system fires the entry. Enter before the signal = gambling. Enter AT the signal = edge.
TradingView alerts remove emotion from exits. Set alert at T1/T2/T3 BEFORE you enter.
NEVER trust Strategy Tester with SHA scripts. Non-standard chart warning = meaningless.

SCANNER FALSE POSITIVE LESSON (HTLM 2026-06-05): Rel Vol 16x sounds good until you check absolute volume. 16x of 4K shares = 69K total. Zero momentum. Always check absolute volume column — under 1M = skip immediately.

MACD IS THE FADING FILTER (2026-06-05): BCDA had K reset + Buy signal but MACD=-0.034. Correctly skipped. CALC had MACD positive and building. Ran from $0.85 to $1.06. MACD histogram >0 separates building from fading.

FLOAT TIERS (2026-06-05): Under 3M = nuclear (100%+ possible, crashes fast). 3-8M = sweet spot. 8-15M = solid. 15-20M = acceptable but slower. Over 20M = skip. Tighter float = each dollar of buying = bigger % move.

AFTERNOON CONFIRMATION (2026-06-05): SNBR and VVOS both showed re-entry setups at 2:30pm ET with clean charts. Neither had volume to reach T1. Time gate (4am-11am ET) is confirmed correct — not just theory.

SUPERTREND IS THE GUN (2026-06-05): W118 Buy label fires after the move starts. Supertrend flips AT the trend change. Enter on Supertrend flip, confirm with W118 indicators. Supertrend = timing, W118 = confirmation.

HOLD OVER WEEKEND RISK (2026-06-05): VVOS closed at $0.87, dropped to $0.78 AH. Stop orders don't execute AH. Weekend holds bypass stop protection. Small size on late-day entries, or don't hold over weekend.

HOW TO READ SCANNER PRIORITY (2026-06-05): Formula = Rel Vol × % Change = priority score. High Rel Vol + low % change = early in move = best. High % change already = late = skip. SPHL at +159% = ghost. SMTK at +36% with 54x rel vol = fresh.

important_rules.pdt_rule: Use Webull CASH account — no PDT. Cash account = unlimited day trades with settled funds.
important_rules.good_faith_violation: Don't buy with unsettled funds then sell same day. 3 violations = 90-day restriction.
important_rules.three_percent_rule: Never enter more than 3% above the BUY signal price.
important_rules.strategy_tester_warning: UNRELIABLE with SHA scripts. Ignore those numbers.
important_rules.one_pine_script: ONE Pine Script: pine-script/weatherman118-curl-flow.pine. Perfect this over time.
important_rules.one_branch: ALWAYS use claude/push-tradingbaby-ESEFn. Never create new branches.
important_rules.security: NEVER paste API keys in chat — only in Colab cells or n8n node code directly.

roadmap.now: Paper trade on Alpaca ($10k) + small real money ($20-40/trade). Building muscle memory. 80% win rate target.
roadmap.month_1_2: Paper trade + small real money. 30+ trades minimum. Log every trade.
roadmap.month_3: Scale to $100-500/trade as win rate proves consistent.
roadmap.month_7_12: At $25k: unlimited day trading unlocked. Compounding accelerates.
roadmap.goal: $25k account with 80%+ win rate = $40k-$60k by end of year 1
